meta.title: An Interview with Eddie Habibi
meta.description:
In this Unsolicited Response episode Dale Peterson talks with Eddie Habibi about his 3 decade journey in starting and building PAS. 

Eddie Habibi started PAS in his house back in 1993, grew it into a $40M revenue company and one of the leaders in ICS asset management, with a focus on security aspects, and alarm management. Recently PAS was acquired by Hexagon.
